log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable, likely a spreader with runtime modules, and has been analyzed in multiple sandboxes.
The sample has dropped 4 files, created 1 process, and has a single registry persistence key.
The dropped files include copies of iexplore.exe.exe in both 32-bit and 64-bit Program Files directories, HelpMe.exe in System32, and a copy of notepad.exe.exe in System32.
The process HelpMe.exe was created, and it loaded several DLLs, including api-ms-win-core-localregistry-l1-1-0.dll, clbcatq.dll, and propsys.dll.
The sample has set a persistence key in the registry, HKLM\SoftWare\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon\Shell, to launch HelpMe.exe and Explorer.exe.
The sample did not establish any network connections, including DNS lookups or HTTP conversations.
